_template_note: Qwen3.5-2B LM config. Hybrid architecture: 18 linear-attention (Gated DeltaNet) layers + 6 full-attention layers (every 4th layer starting at index 3). Layer index % 4 == 3 -> full attention. Uniform max-dim per-layer weight layout; per-layer-type regions zero-padded on the other type.

file_info.comment_full_attn: head_dim=256, num_attn_heads=8, num_kv_heads=2, q_size=2048, kv_size=512, partial_rotary_factor=0.25 (rotary_dim=64)
file_info.comment_linear_attn: num_v_heads=num_k_heads=16 (no GQA), head_k_dim=head_v_dim=128, value_dim=key_dim=2048, conv_dim=6144 (2*key_dim+value_dim), conv_kernel_size=4

default_prefill_tokens_comment: Filled by template at runtime via tokenizer.apply_chat_template. Qwen3.5 uses different vocab than Qwen3.

rope.comment: Text-only LM collapses mRoPE sections to a single 1D position; rotary_dim=64 = head_dim * partial_rotary_factor

rms_norm.comment: Qwen3_5RMSNorm uses (1+w), Qwen3_5RMSNormGated uses raw w. Differs from Qwen3-1.7B which uses 0.0.

embedding.comment: No sqrt(hidden_size) scaling (same as Qwen3-1.7B / Qwen2.5-VL). tie_word_embeddings=True; lm_head reuses embedding weight as BF16 directly.

linear_attn.comment_norm: head_v_dim-length gamma applied after recurrence core inside RMSNormGated
